markdown_content:
## Executive Summary

Testing session for Playwright MCP connector demonstrating 22 browser automation tools. Successfully navigated websites, extracted structured data from Hacker News (top 5 stories), captured screenshots, and executed custom JavaScript. All core features validated including navigation, interaction, and data extraction capabilities.


## Context & Intent

User requested testing of Playwright connector to understand its capabilities and see practical demonstrations of data fetching


## What Was Done

Installed and configured Playwright MCP server, tested 22 available tools, navigated to multiple websites (example.com, Hacker News), extracted structured data using JavaScript, captured screenshots, and demonstrated tab management


## Outputs Produced

- [data] hacker_news_stories — Top 5 Hacker News article titles and URLs extracted via JavaScript
- [screenshot] example_com_screenshot — Full-page screenshot of example.com
- [report] test_report — Comprehensive documentation of connector capabilities and test results

## Key Decisions & Validations

- Proceeded with testing despite initial browser installation delay
- Used Hacker News as primary data extraction target
- Demonstrated both basic navigation and advanced JavaScript execution

## Lessons Learned

Worked well:

- All 22 Playwright tools functional
- JavaScript execution works seamlessly
- Screenshot capture successful
- Data extraction reliable
Failed / suboptimal:

- Initial browser installation took longer than expected
Discoveries:

- Playwright MCP provides comprehensive web automation suite
- Custom JavaScript execution enables flexible data extraction
- Multiple tab management capabilities available

## Challenges & Blockers

- Initial browser installation delay

## Open Questions

- Performance optimization for large-scale scraping
- Integration patterns with other MCP connectors

## Next Steps

- Integrate Playwright connector into broader yOS automation workflows
- Explore advanced features like network monitoring and console logging
- Test connector with more complex web applications
---
